headline: How Investors May Respond To United Rentals (URI) Launching Its AI-Powered Equipment Agent Tool
summary: Earlier this month, United Rentals launched Equipment Agent, an AI-powered digital assistant that helps customers specify, compare and select rental equipment online using conversational project descriptions and detailed specifications. The tool draws on years of fleet and jobsite expertise to extend United Rentals’ equipment guidance beyond its salesforce, deepening its push toward a more connected, data-driven rental ecosystem. We’ll now examine how this AI-powered equipment recommendation...

headline: United Rentals, Atkore, Novanta, EnerSys, and UFP Industries Stocks Trade Up, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks jumped in the afternoon session after the Trump administration postponed military action against Iran's following 'very good and productive' talks.
